description_long: This is a plush, square-shaped stool upholstered in a deep magenta, tufted material with a diamond-patterned design. The top is thickly padded and slightly rounded at the edges, providing a soft and comfortable seating surface. The sides feature a quilted, button-tufted texture, giving it a luxurious and decorative appearance reminiscent of classic Chesterfield furniture. The stool sits directly on the ground with no visible legs, suggesting a boxy, solid base. The upholstery appears to be made of faux leather or vinyl, with a glossy finish that reflects light. This stool would be suitable for use in urban public spaces such as lobbies, lounges, or waiting areas.
description: A plush, magenta, square stool with a padded, tufted top and diamond-patterned sides, finished in glossy faux leather.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded top and the diamond-tufted side with a visible seam on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the same tufted pattern and seam now on the left, highlighting the uniformity of the design.
description_view_2: Rear view with a continuous diamond-tufted pattern and no visible seams, emphasizing the smooth finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the seam now on the right and the glossy finish prominent.
